'''charodo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:praemium|praemium]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-r-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:praemium|praemium]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| charodo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:chæredeth|chæredeth]] || [[word:chæredej|chæredej]] || [[word:chæredesh|chæredesh]] || [[word:chærede|chærede]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:charorodoth|charorodoth]] || [[word:charorodoj|charorodoj]] || [[word:charorodosh|charorodosh]] || [[word:charorodo|charorodo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:charodoth|charodoth]] || [[word:charodoj|charodoj]] || [[word:charodosh|charodosh]] || [[word:charodo|charodo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:charofdoth|charofdoth]] || [[word:charofdoj|charofdoj]] || [[word:charofdosh|charofdosh]] || [[word:charofdof|charofdof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:charodotho|charodotho]] || [[word:charodojo|charodojo]] || [[word:charodosho|charodosho]] || [[word:charodoko|charodoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:charodoth|charodoth]] || [[word:charodoj|charodoj]] || [[word:charodosh|charodosh]] || [[word:charodo|charodo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:charodothol|charodothol]] || [[word:charodojol|charodojol]] || [[word:charodoshol|charodoshol]] || [[word:charodokol|charodokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:charodothotho|charodothotho]] || [[word:charodojojo|charodojojo]] || [[word:charodoshosho|charodoshosho]] || [[word:charodoko|charodoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:charodothon|charodothon]] || [[word:charodojon|charodojon]] || [[word:charodoshon|charodoshon]] || [[word:charodokon|charodokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:charodothoro|charodothoro]] || [[word:charodojoro|charodojoro]] || [[word:charodoshoro|charodoshoro]] || [[word:charodokoro|charodokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|91d6f4e}}
